item.title: 马斯克揭晓特斯拉与xAI联合项目"宏大硬件"，瞄准软件颠覆
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克周三公布了特斯拉与他的人工智能初创公司xAI的联合项目，该项目被命名为"宏大智能"或"数字擎天柱"，他表示该系统能够模拟软件公司的功能。【原文：Elon Musk on Wednesday unveiled a joint project between Tesla and his artificial intelligence startup xAI, which he called "Macrohard" or "Digital ​Optimus" and said that it was a system capable ‌of emulating the functions of software companies.】

item.title: Gen Digital在哥伦比亚大学诉讼案中推翻4.81亿美元专利赔偿裁决
item.description: 美国上诉法院周三推翻了一项4.81亿美元的判决，此前纽约哥伦比亚大学因软件公司Gen Digital侵犯网络安全技术相关专利而胜诉。【原文：A U.S. appeals court on Wednesday overturned a $481 million ruling that New York's Columbia University had won against ​software company Gen Digital for infringing patents related to ‌cybersecurity technology.】

item.title: 英国石油公司和雪佛龙公司在墨西哥湾小型油气拍卖中斥资最多
item.description: 周三，墨西哥湾钻探权拍卖以4698万美元的高价成交，多家石油天然气公司参与竞标。据美国政府直播拍卖会显示，其中英国石油公司（BP）单次出价就占总成交额近半数。【原文：A sale of drilling ‌rights in the Gulf of Mexico on Wednesday ended with $46.98 million in high bids from oil and gas companies, ​with a single bid from BP accounting ​for nearly half of the total, according to ⁠a livestreamed U.S. government auction.】

item.title: 新思科技推出用于设计人工智能芯片的新软件工具
item.description: 新思科技周三推出了一系列新型软件工具，用于应对人工智能芯片设计日益增长的复杂性。这是该公司斥资350亿美元收购工程软件公司安世半导体后推出的首批新产品。【原文：Synopsys on Wednesday rolled out new software tools to handle the fast-increasing complexity of designing ​artificial intelligence chips, the first wave of new offerings after ‌its $35 billion buyout of engineering software firm Ansys.】

item.title: 价格下跌促使美国消费者转向二手电动车
item.description: 电动汽车价格大幅下跌且可靠性不断提升，正吸引更多美国人选择二手电动车。随着联邦补贴逐渐退场，二手车市场正成为那些因价格因素无法购买新车的消费者进入电动汽车领域的重要途径。【原文：Steep depreciation and improving reliability are drawing more Americans to used electric vehicles, turning the pre-owned market into a key entry point for buyers priced out of new EVs as federal incentives fade.】

item.title: 史赛克股价下跌，因有报道称其遭遇疑似与伊朗有关的网络攻击
item.description: 周三，史赛克股价下跌约3%，此前《华尔街日报》报道称这家医疗设备制造商遭遇疑似与伊朗有关的网络攻击。【原文：Stryker's shares fell about 3% on Wednesday after the Wall Street ​Journal reported that the medical ‌equipment maker was hit by a suspected Iran-linked cyberattack.】

item.title: WhatsApp推出家长管理账户服务，针对安全担忧的学龄前儿童群体
item.description: Meta旗下WhatsApp周三宣布，将允许家长为未满13岁的儿童创建账户，该账户仅限于消息和通话功能。此举正值全球对社交媒体和聊天应用对儿童影响的担忧日益加剧之际。【原文：Meta Platforms-owned WhatsApp said on Wednesday it would allow parents to ​create accounts for pre-teens, restricted to messaging ‌and calling, amid rising global concerns about the impact of social media and chat apps on children.】

item.title: 法官表示，莱昂·布莱克可能在爱泼斯坦指控者对美国银行的诉讼中被传唤作证
item.description: 法庭文件周三显示，亿万富翁、阿波罗全球管理公司联合创始人莱昂·布莱克可能因一起民事诉讼被传唤作证。该诉讼由多名女性对美国银行提起，她们指控该银行为杰弗里·爱泼斯坦性侵她们提供了便利。【原文：Billionaire Apollo Global ​Management co-founder Leon ‌Black could be deposed as part of ​a civil ​lawsuit brought against Bank ⁠of America by ​women who accuse ​the bank of facilitating their sexual abuse by ​Jeffrey Epstein, court ​records showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: KKR首席财务官表示，其公开交易的私募信贷基金面临压力
item.description: KKR首席财务官罗伯特·卢因周三表示，该公司公开交易的私募信贷基金面临一定压力，但公司认为非交易性投资工具蕴藏更多机遇。【原文：KKR's publicly traded private credit fund has seen some pressure, ​but the company sees more opportunity ‌in non-traded vehicles, Chief Financial Officer Robert Lewin said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 美国国家运输安全委员会将就两起致命福特车祸举行听证会
item.description: 美国国家运输安全委员会将于3月31日举行听证会，以确定两起致命车祸的可能原因，这两起事故均涉及福特汽车公司的高级驾驶辅助系统BlueCruise。【原文：The National Transportation Safety Board will ​hold a March 31 ‌hearing to determine the probable cause of two ​fatal crashes involving Ford ​Motor's advanced driver assistance ⁠system BlueCruise.】

item.title: 英伟达支持的初创公司Scintil Photonics开始与客户测试激光芯片
item.description: 由英伟达支持的法国初创企业Scintil Photonics周三表示，已开始向客户提供激光芯片用于测试。【原文：Scintil Photonics, a French startup backed by Nvidia, on Wednesday said it has started providing laser chips to customers ​for testing.】

item.title: Meta公布自研AI芯片系列计划
item.description: Meta Platforms周三公布了四款自主研发芯片的路线图，随着其数据中心规模的快速扩张，该公司正加速推进芯片自主研发进程。【原文：Meta Platforms on Wednesday unveiled a roadmap of four new chips that the company is making in-house, as it rapidly expands its ​data centers.】

item.title: 快讯：2月通胀符合预期，伊朗战争阴影笼罩上月数据
item.description: 数据显示，美国2月份消费者价格较去年同期上涨2.4%，符合经济学家的预期。【原文：U.S. consumer prices rose 2.4% from a year ago in February, data showed, matching economists' expectations.】

item.title: Grubhub携手无人机初创企业Dexa，在新泽西州开展空中配送试点项目
item.description: 外卖平台Grubhub与无人机技术公司Dexa于周三宣布启动为期三个月的试点项目，将在新泽西州格林布鲁克地区为顾客提供空中送餐服务。【原文：Grubhub and drone technology company Dexa announced a three-month pilot program on Wednesday to introduce aerial ​food delivery services to customers in Green Brook, ‌New Jersey.】

item.title: 花旗、渣打撤离迪拜办公室，汇丰关闭卡塔尔分行，恐慌情绪加剧
item.description: 据消息人士周三透露，花旗集团和渣打银行已开始撤离其迪拜办事处，要求员工改为居家办公。此前伊朗威胁将打击与美国和以色列有关联的海湾地区银行利益，促使银行加强防范措施。【原文：Citigroup and Standard Chartered have begun evacuating their Dubai offices, telling staff ‌to work from home instead, sources said on Wednesday, as banks step up precautions after Iran threatened Gulf banking interests linked to the U.S. and Israel.】

item.title: Babybel奶酪制造商扩大南达科他州工厂规模，减肥药需求助推市场增长
item.description: 法国乳制品巨头贝尔集团周三在南达科他州布鲁金斯市启动了一项耗资2亿美元的扩建项目，旨在将旗下Babybel奶酪工厂的产能提升一倍。该集团以Babybel奶酪和Laughing Cow奶酪等奶酪零食闻名，此举旨在满足减肥药物使用者及其他注重健康的美国消费者对健康零食的需求。【原文：Bel Group, the French company famous for cheese snacks like Babybel and Laughing Cow, broke ground on Wednesday on a $200 million project to ​double capacity at its Brookings, South Dakota, Babybel plant, moving to meet healthy ‌snack demand from weight-loss-drug users and other health-conscious Americans.】

item.title: Nuro自动驾驶汽车技术登陆东京街头，实现首次国际部署
item.description: 美国初创企业Nuro周三表示，其自动驾驶车辆现已在东京公共道路上运行，车内配备安全操作员，这标志着该公司首次在国际市场部署自动驾驶技术。【原文：U.S.-based startup Nuro said on Wednesday its self-driving vehicles are now operating on public roads in ​Tokyo with safety operators present, marking the company's ‌first international autonomous deployment.】

item.title: 激进股东Starboard敦促CarMax全面改革数字销售业务并削减成本
item.description: 激进投资者Starboard Value周三敦促CarMax重整其数字购车和卖车平台并压缩成本，称这家二手车零售商"远未发挥其潜在价值"。【原文：Activist investor Starboard Value on Wednesday urged CarMax to revamp its digital car-buying and ​selling platform and tighten costs, arguing the ‌used-car retailer has "fallen well short of its underlying potential".】

item.title: 快照：二月通胀数据公布后，华尔街期货小幅走低
item.description: 周三美国股指期货小幅走低，投资者正评估符合预期的2月消费者价格数据以及美联储对货币政策的前景展望。【原文：U.S. stock index futures inched lower on Wednesday as investors ​assessed an in-line February consumer ‌prices reading and the Federal Reserve's outlook for monetary policy.】

item.title: 美国2月份消费者价格上涨0.3%，汽油价格上涨是主要推手。
item.description: 美国2月份消费者价格有所回升，因中东地区战争升级预期推高汽油价格，而冲突导致油价上涨，预计3月份通胀率将进一步攀升。【原文：U.S. consumer prices picked up in February as the cost of gasoline increased in anticipation of an escalating war in the Middle East, and with the conflict driving up oil ​prices, a further rise in inflation is expected in March.】

item.title: 伊朗相关能源价格飙升压缩新兴市场降息空间
item.description: 伊朗战争引发的油价飙升，目前已使从波兰到土耳其的新兴市场央行暂停了货币宽松政策。政策制定者正面临通胀预期急剧上升和风险规避情绪加剧的局面。【原文：The oil price spike brought on by the war in Iran has, for now, short-circuited a monetary easing push among emerging market central banks from Poland to Turkey as policymakers reckon with a sharp uptick in inflation expectations and rising ​risk aversion.】

item.title: 英伟达将向人工智能云公司Nebius投资20亿美元
item.description: 英伟达周三宣布将向人工智能云公司Nebius投资20亿美元，这进一步扩大了这家领先芯片制造商在人工智能企业中的投资版图。【原文：Nvidia said ​on Wednesday it will invest $2 ‌billion in artificial intelligence cloud company Nebius , adding to the ​leading chipmaker's growing list ​of investments in AI firms.】

item.title: Zoox与优步联手在网约车平台部署无人驾驶出租车
item.description: 优步科技公司周三宣布，已与Zoox公司签署多年期合作协议，将在其平台部署Zoox专为自动驾驶打造的机器人出租车。这标志着Zoox首次与第三方网约车服务商展开合作。【原文：Uber Technologies signed a ‌multi-year partnership to deploy Zoox's purpose-built robotaxis to its platform, the companies said on Wednesday, marking the latter's first venture with a third-party ride-hailing service.】

item.title: 金宝汤公司下调年度预测，警示新进口关税带来的压力
item.description: 康宝公司周三警告称，由于宏观经济风险上升，该公司下调了全年销售额和利润预期，并表示修订后的美国关税将在下半年带来日益增大的压力。【原文：Campbell's Co on Wednesday warned of increasing ​pressure in the second half of the ‌year from the revised U.S. tariffs, after cutting its annual sales and profit forecasts citing rising macroeconomic risks.】

item.title: 西班牙将推出社交媒体仇恨言论监测工具，桑切斯总理宣布
item.description: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯周三表示，该国将推出一款工具来衡量数字平台上的仇恨言论，作为加强对社交媒体公司监管的更广泛战略的一部分。【原文：Spain will launch a tool to measure hate speech on digital platforms as ​part of a broader strategy to increase ‌oversight of social media companies, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 巴西雷森公司达成126亿美元债务重组协议
item.description: 巴西糖业和乙醇生产商瑞森公司周三表示，已与债权人和债券持有人达成庭外债务重组协议，涉及约651亿雷亚尔（126.1亿美元）的债务。【原文：Brazilian sugar and ethanol ​producer Raizen said on ‌Wednesday it has reached an out-of-court debt restructuring agreement ​with creditors and bondholders ​covering about 65.1 billion reais ($12.61 ⁠billion) in obligations.】

item.title: 独家：壳牌、道达尔能源等公司向卡塔尔液化天然气客户宣告"燃料管理"——消息人士称
item.description: 三名消息人士周三向路透社透露，多家从卡塔尔能源公司采购液化天然气（LNG）的投资组合企业或承购商——包括壳牌、道达尔能源以及部分亚洲企业——已向其供货客户宣布不可抗力。【原文：Several companies that buy liquefied natural ‌gas (LNG) from QatarEnergy as portfolio players or offtakers — including Shell , TotalEnergies and some firms in Asia — have declared force majeure ​to customers they supply, three sources told Reuters ​on Wednesday.】

item.title: 晨间竞价：从恐慌到耐心
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 奥沃尔塔首席财务官称评估中东战争影响为时尚早
item.description: 瑞士免税零售商Avolta周三公布2025财年全年业绩后表示，目前预测中东冲突对其业务的影响为时尚早。【原文：Swiss duty-free retailer Avolta said on Wednesday it was too early to predict the impact on ​its business from the conflict in the Middle East after ‌reporting full-year results for 2025.】

item.title: 宝马因存在起火风险在中国召回147,830辆汽车
item.description: 中国市场监管总局周三表示，宝马将因"启动电机存在制造问题"在中国召回147,830辆汽车，该问题可能导致车辆难以启动，"极端情况下……存在起火风险"。【原文：BMW will recall 147,830 vehicles in China ​over a "manufacturing issue with ‌the starter motor," which could result in difficulty starting the ​vehicle or in "extreme cases ... ​pose a fire risk," China's ⁠market regulator said on ​Wednesday.】
